# ux-flow — Feature X spec review

## Critical Gaps

- Empty-state copy is missing for first-time users; the dashboard will render a blank pane with no call to action.

## Important Considerations

- Bulk import progress is not surfaced to the user once submitted.
- Inline edit save state is not described (autosave vs explicit save button).

## Observations

- Color tokens used in mocks match the design system.

## Verdict: APPROVE WITH SUGGESTIONS
